category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to Tanzania market (TBS mandatory PVoC + Certificate of Conformity, TZS standards adopting EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3, OSHA Tanzania occupational-safety framework).

title.en: China-to-Tanzania PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入坦桑尼亚（TBS）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入坦尚尼亞（TBS）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Tanzania market-access requirements: TBS mandatory Pre-export Verification of Conformity (PVoC), Certificate of Conformity (CoC), TBS standardisation mark, Tanzania Standards (TZS) adopting EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3, the OSHA Tanzania occupational-safety framework, and importer responsibilities. Goods clear principally through Dar es Salaam.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与坦桑尼亚市场准入要求对照，涵盖TBS强制出口前合格验证（PVoC）、合格证书（CoC）、TBS标准化标志、坦桑尼亚标准（TZS）采纳的EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3、坦桑尼亚职业安全（OSHA）框架，以及进口商责任。货物主要经达累斯萨拉姆港清关。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與坦尚尼亞市場准入要求對照，涵蓋TBS強制出口前合格驗證（PVoC）、合格證書（CoC）、TBS標準化標誌、坦尚尼亞標準（TZS）採納的EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3、坦尚尼亞職業安全（OSHA）框架，以及進口商責任。貨物主要經達累斯薩拉姆港清關。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Tanzania law, TBS standards and PVoC route requirements, applicable TZS/EN standards, and destination-country import practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行坦桑尼亚法律、TBS标准及PVoC路径要求、适用的TZS/EN标准及目的地国进口实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行坦尚尼亞法律、TBS標準及PVoC路徑要求、適用的TZS/EN標準及目的地國進口實踐。

answer_first.en: Filtering facepiece respirators exported to Tanzania fall under the Tanzania Bureau of Standards (TBS) mandatory Pre-export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme: each consignment requires a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) before shipment, and regulated goods must bear the TBS standardisation mark. TBS adopts EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3) as the applicable Tanzania Standard (TZS) for filtering half masks. Chinese GB 2626 (KN95) test reports do not by themselves satisfy the TZS/EN 149 conformity basis — testing must align with the standard referenced on the CoC. Occupational use is framed by OSHA Tanzania, and a local importer bears clearance and market-placement responsibility.
answer_first.zh: 出口至坦桑尼亚的过滤式半面罩呼吸器受坦桑尼亚标准局（TBS）强制出口前合格验证（PVoC）计划管辖：每批货物在装运前须取得合格证书（CoC），受管制货物须加施TBS标准化标志。TBS采纳EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）作为过滤式半面罩适用的坦桑尼亚标准（TZS）。中国GB 2626（KN95）检测报告本身不满足TZS/EN 149合格基础——检测须与CoC上引用的标准一致。职业使用由坦桑尼亚OSHA框架规范，本地进口商承担清关及市场投放责任。
answer_first.zht: 出口至坦尚尼亞的過濾式半面罩呼吸器受坦尚尼亞標準局（TBS）強制出口前合格驗證（PVoC）計劃管轄：每批貨物在裝運前須取得合格證書（CoC），受管制貨物須加施TBS標準化標誌。TBS採納EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）作為過濾式半面罩適用的坦尚尼亞標準（TZS）。中國GB 2626（KN95）檢測報告本身不滿足TZS/EN 149合格基礎——檢測須與CoC上引用的標準一致。職業使用由坦尚尼亞OSHA框架規範，本地進口商承擔清關及市場投放責任。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator or standards-body sources (TBS, OSHA Tanzania, EN/ISO) are preferred; local PDFs are not accepted as primary sources.
